text:
PRVDR_GRP_ACTV_IND_12 

LABEL: Provider Group Active Indicator — January through December 

DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate the provider’s affiliated group specified in the PRVDR_GRP_ID variable was active in 
the given month. Each of 12 months.

SHORT NAME: 
PRVDR_GRP_ACTV_IND_01 
PRVDR_GRP_ACTV_IND_02 
PRVDR_GRP_ACTV_IND_03 
PRVDR_GRP_ACTV_IND_04 
PRVDR_GRP_ACTV_IND_05 
PRVDR_GRP_ACTV_IND_06 
 PRVDR_GRP_ACTV_IND_07 
PRVDR_GRP_ACTV_IND_08 
PRVDR_GRP_ACTV_IND_09 
PRVDR_GRP_ACTV_IND_10
